claims.claim: High-entropy pressure smoothing should visibly broaden the recent-sample ballast window, including the reported entropy 0.95 probe.
claims.rationale: Adjusted the read-only pressure smoothing entropy ramp so entropy 0.95 with low porosity reaches the full 15-sample ballast window, with a targeted regression proving the behavior.

claims.claim: A connected WebSocket lane can still be functionally clogged when semantic viscosity is high and semantic trickle is low.
claims.rationale: Added read-only `semantic_stagnation_index` and `semantic_stagnation_state` to pressure smoothing and pressure-source analysis, surfacing `functional_clog_connected_lanes_watch` without changing pressure, fill, cadence, or control.

claims.claim: Pressure/porosity evidence should be compared without silently applying porosity expansion or pressure relief.
claims.rationale: Verified the existing pressure-porosity expansion readiness path remains read-only and explicitly says local control is not applied; no pressure, porosity, PI, or Minime-control mutation was made.
